mapper.select:
SELECT p.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.manufacturer, p.part_code, p.safe_quantity, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS current_stock_quantity, p.active FROM tb_pc_part p JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_part_stock s ON s.company_id = p.company_id AND s.part_id = p.part_id
ORDER BY p.part_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pc_part p JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(s.quantity, 0)), 0) AS total_stock, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.safe_quantity > 0 AND COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) < p.safe_quantity THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS low_stock_count FROM tb_pc_part p JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_part_stock s ON s.company_id = p.company_id AND s.part_id = p.part_id
mapper.sql:
WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId}
AND u.active = FALSE
AND u.active = TRUE
AND u.part_id = #{partId}
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_stock_movement_unit f_smu JOIN tb_stock_movement f_sm ON f_sm.company_id = u.company_id AND f_sm.movement_id = f_smu.movement_id WHERE f_smu.unit_id = u.unit_id AND f_sm.document_id = #{documentId} )
AND ( u.internal_serial_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.manufacturer_serial_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.part_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.part_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND ( u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' OR ( u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.grade <> 'DEFECTIVE' ) OR ( u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE' ) OR ( u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'HOLD' ) )
AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'WAITING'
AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.grade <> 'DEFECTIVE'
AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE'
AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'HOLD'
AND
AND
AND u.unit_status = 'OUTBOUND'
AND u.unit_status = 'CANCELED'
AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.grade = #{partState}

u.unit_id, u.internal_serial_no, u.manufacturer_serial_no, p.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.manufacturer, p.part_code, u.unit_status, u.inspection_status, u.grade, u.sales_status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, ( SELECT sd.document_no FROM tb_stock_movement_unit smu JOIN tb_stock_movement sm ON sm.movement_id = smu.movement_id AND sm.company_id = u.company_id JOIN tb_stock_document sd ON sd.company_id = sm.company_id AND sd.document_id = sm.document_id WHERE smu.unit_id = u.unit_id ORDER BY sm.created_at DESC, sm.movement_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_stock_document_no, ( SELECT sm.movement_type FROM tb_stock_movement_unit smu JOIN tb_stock_movement sm ON sm.movement_id = smu.movement_id AND sm.company_id = u.company_id WHERE smu.unit_id = u.unit_id ORDER BY sm.created_at DESC, sm.movement_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_stock_movement_type, ( SELECT sm.created_at FROM tb_stock_movement_unit smu JOIN tb_stock_movement sm ON sm.movement_id = smu.movement_id AND sm.company_id = u.company_id WHERE smu.unit_id = u.unit_id ORDER BY sm.created_at DESC, sm.movement_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_stock_processed_at, ( SELECT i.inspection_id FROM tb_inspection i WHERE i.company_id = u.company_id AND i.unit_id = u.unit_id ORDER BY i.inspected_at DESC, i.inspection_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_inspection_id, ( SELECT i.inspection_type FROM tb_inspection i WHERE i.company_id = u.company_id AND i.unit_id = u.unit_id ORDER BY i.inspected_at DESC, i.inspection_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_inspection_type, ( SELECT i.inspected_at FROM tb_inspection i WHERE i.company_id = u.company_id AND i.unit_id = u.unit_id ORDER BY i.inspected_at DESC, i.inspection_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_inspected_at

CASE WHEN base.last_stock_processed_at IS NULL AND base.last_inspected_at IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN base.last_stock_processed_at IS NULL THEN '검수' WHEN base.last_inspected_at IS NULL THEN CASE base.last_stock_movement_type WHEN 'INBOUND' THEN '입고' WHEN 'OUTBOUND' THEN '출고' WHEN 'INBOUND_CANCEL' THEN '입고취소' WHEN 'OUTBOUND_CANCEL' THEN '출고취소' ELSE '입출고' END WHEN base.last_inspected_at >= base.last_stock_processed_at THEN '검수' ELSE CASE base.last_stock_movement_type WHEN 'INBOUND' THEN '입고' WHEN 'OUTBOUND' THEN '출고' WHEN 'INBOUND_CANCEL' THEN '입고취소' WHEN 'OUTBOUND_CANCEL' THEN '출고취소' ELSE '입출고' END END AS recent_event_label, CASE WHEN base.last_stock_processed_at IS NULL AND base.last_inspected_at IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN base.last_stock_processed_at IS NULL THEN base.last_inspected_at WHEN base.last_inspected_at IS NULL THEN base.last_stock_processed_at WHEN base.last_inspected_at >= base.last_stock_processed_at THEN base.last_inspected_at ELSE base.last_stock_processed_at END AS recent_event_at
mapper.select:
SELECT base.*,
FROM ( SELECT
FROM ( SELECT u.company_id, u.unit_id FROM tb_pc_part_unit u JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id
ORDER BY u.updated_at DESC, u.unit_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset} ) page_units JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = page_units.company_id AND u.unit_id = page_units.unit_id JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id ) base ORDER BY base.updated_at DESC, base.unit_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND ( u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' OR ( u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.grade <> 'DEFECTIVE' ) OR ( u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE' ) OR ( u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'HOLD' ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS held_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS waiting_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.grade <> 'DEFECTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sales_available_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sales_hold_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sales_unavailable_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.grade = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS grade_a_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.grade = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS grade_b_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.grade = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS grade_c_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.grade = 'DEFECTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS defective_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'OUTBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS outbound_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'AVAILABLE' AND u.grade <> 'DEFECTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS outbound_available_count FROM tb_pc_part_unit u JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id

SELECT base.*,
FROM ( SELECT
FROM tb_pc_part_unit u JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.unit_id = #{unitId} AND u.active = TRUE ) base

SELECT sm.movement_id, sd.document_id, sd.document_no, sm.movement_type, smu.before_unit_status, smu.after_unit_status, COALESCE(m.name, CONCAT('ID ', sm.processed_by)) AS processed_by_name, sm.created_at FROM tb_pc_part_unit u JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit smu ON smu.unit_id = u.unit_id JOIN tb_stock_movement sm ON sm.company_id = u.company_id AND sm.movement_id = smu.movement_id JOIN tb_stock_document sd ON sd.company_id = sm.company_id AND sd.document_id = sm.document_id LEFT JOIN tb_member m ON m.company_id = sm.company_id AND m.member_id = sm.processed_by WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.unit_id = #{unitId} ORDER BY sm.created_at DESC, sm.movement_id DESC LIMIT #{size}

SELECT i.inspection_id, i.inspection_type, i.result, i.grade, i.sales_status, COALESCE(m.name, CONCAT('ID ', i.inspected_by)) AS inspected_by_name, i.inspected_at, i.memo FROM tb_pc_part_unit u JOIN tb_inspection i ON i.company_id = u.company_id AND i.unit_id = u.unit_id LEFT JOIN tb_member m ON m.company_id = i.company_id AND m.member_id = i.inspected_by WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.unit_id = #{unitId} ORDER BY i.inspected_at DESC, i.inspection_id DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT part_id, company_id, category_id, created_by, part_name, model_name, manufacturer, part_code, safe_quantity, active FROM tb_pc_part WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND part_id = #{partId}

SELECT p.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.manufacturer, p.part_code, p.safe_quantity, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS current_stock_quantity, p.active FROM tb_pc_part p JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_part_stock s ON s.company_id = p.company_id AND s.part_id = p.part_id WHERE p.company_id = #{companyId} AND p.part_id = #{partId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pc_part ( company_id, category_id, created_by, part_name, model_name, manufacturer, part_code, safe_quantity, active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{categoryId}, #{createdBy}, #{partName}, #{modelName}, #{manufacturer}, #{partCode}, #{safeQuantity}, #{active}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pc_part SET category_id = #{categoryId}, part_name = #{partName}, model_name = #{modelName}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, part_code = #{partCode}, safe_quantity = #{safeQuantity}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND part_id = #{partId}
mapper.select: SELECT v.spec_value_id, v.spec_definition_id, d.spec_key, d.spec_name, d.input_type, d.unit, v.value_number, v.value_text, v.value_boolean, v.selected_option_id, v.selected_option_label_snapshot AS selected_option_label, v.selected_option_value_snapshot AS selected_option_value FROM tb_part_spec_value v JOIN tb_part_spec_definition d ON d.company_id = v.company_id AND d.spec_definition_id = v.spec_definition_id WHERE v.company_id = #{companyId} AND v.part_id = #{partId} ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC, d.spec_definition_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_part_spec_value ( company_id, part_id, spec_definition_id, value_text, value_number, value_boolean, selected_option_id, selected_option_label_snapshot, selected_option_value_snapshot, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{partId}, #{specDefinitionId}, #{valueText}, #{valueNumber}, #{valueBoolean}, #{selectedOptionId}, #{selectedOptionLabelSnapshot}, #{selectedOptionValueSnapshot}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
